--stop skid kid!

return(function(...)local A,P do local H,b,K,C,R=math.floor,string.char,string.byte,tonumber,string.sub local function r(A,P)local b=0 for K=0,7,1 do local C=A/2+P/2 if C~=H(C)then b=b+2^K end A=H(A/2)P=H(P/2)end return b end local Q,M="iiihhhiiiiihssss","\172\152\190\235\218\236\186\144\220\003\251\231\179\029\142\245\148\165\128\223\000\000\001\000\000\001\a\000\000\000__index\006\000\000\000__call\005\000\000\000__mod\005\000\000\000__mul"local X=65 local E=1100 local N=false local function c(A)local c={}for P=1,#A,2 do local H=R(A,P,P+1)c[#c+1]=C(H,16)end local q={}for A=0,3,1 do local P=c[A+1]local H=((P-E)+256)%256 local b=K(Q,A%16+1)local C=K(M,A%X+1)q[A+1]=r(r(H,b),C)end local V=((q[1]+q[2]*256)+q[3]*65536)+q[4]*16777216 local D={}for A=1,V,1 do local P=c[A+4]if N and A%2==0 then P=(P%16)*16+H(P/16)end local C=((P-E)+256)%256 local R=(A-1)%16+1 local q=(A-1)%X+1 local V=K(Q,R)local U=K(M,q)D[A]=b(r(r(C,V),U))end return table.concat(D)end local q={{8755,"0E3D23CFE6FA0A39222DF7"},{6315,"0D3D23CFE6FAFC2C"};{"0C3D23CFE6FA073228",3875};{5120;"193D23CFCFD0052C123908E3"};{"0F3D23CFFCEBF32E1D3B",1196};{3876,"0C3D23CF01DC0A3D0D"},{"183D23CFFEEAF1340D40FEE61C";2680},{5121;"193D23CFE1EAF036123908E3"};{"1C3D23CFCEE0EF1F1F42F307266B4837FF73DF20E8F4CC0E67",9522};{2681,"183D23CFE3E4FC3712F0DED724"};{"173D23CFCFE405334039EDD60D754632F856",240},{8038,"123D23CFD8CEE2"};{"0D3D23CFD3E0023A";6316};{"1B3D23CFF5EA02330D3CEDDC2759";7082},{"0D3D23CFEEDC0632",6317};{"D83D23CFF9D1EF3F0D0A4822135731EDF353D53AD4FAE810596657525368575253A99B8FB974B2B8C54F50A7929EA3CBBF7CB95F5B6692AB9EB0AECA8F50544D8E4FC6B3BDF00F4534273DF3CC";9983},{8756,"0E3D23CFD9D1EF3F412DF3"},{"173D23CF0304CE2D4731D0D5CD9F2825D963";241};{242;"173D23CFD5EA3A0620FECDE122892833F4A4"};{"193D23CFD9D0062E283706E9";5122};{1197,"0F3D23CFD5EA043F232C"};{5359,"153D23CFDEDC0A434037ED06294F4A37"};{8757,"0E3D23CFE2EAEE39221903"};{1198,"0F3D23CFDFEA07422B2D"};{1007;"253D23CF03DFFB2E0D4302D9285AF4EC3BAB18FD16402ACFA9A59DA8A5ABA4AA"},{"2A3D23CF03DFFB2E0D4302D9285AF4EC3BA3160B104025CDA9AAABAAA8A6AB",290};{"2A3D23CF03DFFB2E0D4302D9285AF4EC3BA310FF1A4525D3ABA9ABABA49CA8";291};{243;"173D23CFDB03EA371338F0FE3F731635E36D"},{244;"173D23CFED0AEC12CC3403073FA8F216FB4D"},{"173D23CF400200212342DDE83B5C3D3AE0A2",245},{3877,"0C3D23CFDDEAF13C29"};{"0F3D23CFE1DCF132283C",1199},{"173D23CF4103F136101B30F624591423D08B",246};{2682,"183D23CFE3E4FC371218FEE31D"};{"173D23CFE3D4FE15D72D2DE92F73ED18E688",247};{248;"173D23CF3EECEB41250DDC1722852D45DE80"},{5123,"193D23CFCFDC0832462DFEE9"};{"1A3D23CFCEE0EF0C26390BE9135B48",4642};{5124;"193D23CFD8EBF0431F36FCE8"},{8039;"123D23CFF7E0EC"};{2683,"183D23CFD0EB0A3A1F3C06E227"};{1008,"253D23CF03DFFB2E0D4302D9285AF4EC3BAB180A1A4026D3A8A69CAB9CA7A69C"},{4643,"1A3D23CFD0EB0A3A1F3C06E2276F42"},{"0E3D23CFE2D1043F0E2D03";8758};{8759,"0E3D23CFD2EA05392333F3"},{"0D3D23CFFDDCF034",6318},{3878,"0C3D23CFEDE0072E17"},{249,"173D23CF3FD5E11F3F1802F41C7AEF2FED74"};{"143D23CFDFE62
